## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Call flow design content needs consistency in tone and perspective throughout](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Templates require final refinements; focus shifting to call flow design and AI components](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Website performance shows steady organic growth, with blog and industry pages driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Custom prompts added to Scrunch; initial results for multi-location business content appearing](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Call flow design cluster in production with multiple topics (e.g., psychology for call interactions, intelligent call routing)](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Plan to publish on blog first, then create a hub page linking to published assets](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Need for a project brief to address SEO considerations when moving content from blog to hub](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Template Refinements

  - [Minor inconsistencies in formatting and design still present (e.g., font colors, spacing issues)](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Decision to prioritize fixing remaining issues and publishing templates](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Shift focus to call flow design and AI components rather than scaling templates further](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Website Performance Analysis

  - [Steady growth in organic traffic and engaged sessions](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Blog and industry pages are key traffic drivers for organic and OLM (Organic Lead Magnet) traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Homepage, AI receptionist page, and blog pages driving most key conversions](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Significant growth in first position (45%) and 2-10 position (90%) queries in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Upcoming Reporting and Analysis

  - [Q3 performance summary to be prepared for next week](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Plan to share detailed keyword and URL ranking data for strategic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Custom prompts added to Scrunch; initial results for multi-location business content appearing](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Address consistency issues in call flow design content](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Finalize template refinements with a focus on fixing remaining design issues](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Prepare and share Q3 performance summary next week](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Export and analyze keyword ranking data to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xhhUi8gSU3pET6xwKTtGBxifwsXGeYmC?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
